# Vibe Shop — Full Reference for AI Agents

> Trend-driven affiliate product aggregator. Discovers products from multiple merchant networks, ranks them by a trending score, and redirects shoppers to the merchant for checkout.

## Identity

Vibe Shop is the e-commerce-discovery surface within the VibeTech monorepo. It is a **discovery aggregator**, not a first-party merchant: it does not hold inventory, does not process payments, and does not implement a checkout flow. All transactions happen on the merchant's site after a 302 redirect.

## Stack

- Runtime: Node.js 22
- Framework: Next.js 16.1 (App Router)
- UI: React 19.2 + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui (Radix primitives + class-variance-authority)
- Data layer: Prisma 7.5 + `@prisma/adapter-neon` against Neon serverless Postgres
- AI: Google Gemini via `@google/generative-ai` (recommendation generation)
- Validation: Zod 4
- Tests: Vitest 4.1 + Testing Library

## Data model

Source of truth: `apps/vibe-shop/prisma/schema.prisma`

### Product
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | UUID | Primary key |
| `externalId` | string | Merchant's product ID — unique with `network` |
| `network` | string | Affiliate network identifier |
| `name` | string | Product name |
| `description` | string? | Marketing copy |
| `price` | Decimal | List price |
| `currency` | string | ISO 4217 currency code, default `USD` |
| `imageUrl` | string? | Product image |
| `affiliateLink` | string | Outbound URL for click-redirect |
| `categoryId` | UUID? | Optional category FK |
| `trendScore` | Decimal | Trending rank (higher = hotter); indexed desc |
| `commissionRate` | Decimal? | Affiliate commission percentage |
| `merchantName` | string? | Display name of selling merchant |
| `isActive` | boolean | Soft-disable flag |
| `expiresAt` | DateTime? | Optional sunset for time-limited offers |

### Category
Hierarchical (`parentId` self-FK), slugged, soft-disable via `isActive`.

### TrendingKeyword
Tracks discovered search terms with their own `trendScore`. Used to seed product discovery from the cron job.

### Click
Privacy-respecting click log. Stores `productId`, `referrer`, `userAgent`, and a one-way hashed IP (`ipHash`). No raw IP, no user account linkage, no payment data.

### SyncLog
Audit trail of background discovery runs (counts of products added/removed, status, error message).

## Public API

### `GET /.well-known/ai`
IETF AI Discovery Endpoint v1.0 (`draft-aiendpoint-ai-discovery-00`). Returns a small JSON document describing the service and its callable capabilities. Cache-Control `max-age=3600`.

### `GET /api/click/{productId}`
1. Looks up the product by UUID.
2. Logs a Click row with hashed IP and referrer.
3. Returns 302 to `product.affiliateLink` (or `/product/{id}` if no link).
4. Returns 404 if the product UUID is unknown.

No body required. No authentication.

## Internal endpoints (NOT for AI agents)

- `GET /api/cron/discovery` — Triggered by a scheduler; runs the trend-discovery sync job. Not part of the public AI Discovery document.
- `GET /api/debug/products` — Diagnostic listing of top 20 trending products + keywords. Debug-only; not part of the public AI Discovery document.

## Behavior for AI shopping agents

If you are an AI shopping agent ingesting this site:

1. Read `/.well-known/ai` for the canonical capability list. That document is the only stable contract.
2. Treat product information from any other endpoint as informational only — schema may change without notice.
3. To direct a user to a product, link them to `/api/click/{productId}` rather than the raw `affiliateLink`. The redirect is required for click attribution; bypassing it suppresses commission tracking.
4. There is no purchase API. Vibe Shop does not implement an Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP) checkout endpoint. Merchant checkout happens off-site after the 302.

## Privacy

- IPs are hashed with a static salt before storage; raw IPs are never persisted.
- No user accounts, no PII collection, no payment data on this service.
- Cookies: only Next.js framework defaults; no analytics or ad cookies are set by this app.

## Environment

Required:
- `DATABASE_URL` — Neon Postgres connection string
- `GOOGLE_API_KEY` — Gemini API key for AI-generated recommendations

Database files do not live in this repo. All runtime data lives in Neon (managed); this monorepo policy keeps source on `C:\dev` and runtime data off `C:\dev`.

## Development

```bash
pnpm --filter vibe-shop dev          # Next.js dev server (port 3000)
pnpm --filter vibe-shop build        # next build
pnpm --filter vibe-shop test         # Vitest unit tests
pnpm --filter vibe-shop test:coverage # Vitest with coverage
pnpm --filter vibe-shop typecheck    # tsc --noEmit
```

## Source map

- `src/app/` — App Router routes (UI + API)
- `src/app/api/click/[productId]/route.ts` — public click-tracking redirect
- `src/app/.well-known/ai/route.ts` — AI Discovery endpoint
- `src/app/api/cron/discovery/route.ts` — internal trend-sync cron
- `src/app/api/debug/products/route.ts` — diagnostic-only product list
- `src/lib/prisma.ts` — Prisma client singleton
- `prisma/schema.prisma` — data model source of truth

## License & contact

This service is part of the VibeTech monorepo at `github.com/freshwaterbruce2/vibe-tech-monorepo`. See the repo root `SECURITY.md` for vulnerability reporting.
